body:
There's no point in sugarcoating it.  This is a disaster for Ecuador. 

Get the win and pile up a  few extra goals, and you're in decent shape to squeak through as a third place team just so long as Germany doesn't vaporize you too badly.  Instead not only do you not get that precious goal difference, you don't even get the three points. 

  
Better have your bags packed, cause barring a miracle, you're flying home pretty soon.
Curucão deserves some serious praise but as someone that wanted Ecuador to thrive this wc, that match was brutal to watch

Dick Advocaat was in charge of the best Rangers team I ever watched when I was a youngster

A quarter of a Century later, in his Last Stand, he's built the squad of a small Caribbean island nation from a bunch of scraps and ex-pats to their first world cup, got their first point (something that took decades for many nations) and made them stay in it in the last group game.

Curacao weren't just here to make up the numbers. They got battered in their first game, sure. But they aren't a joke/ a laughing stock.

No wonder he was in tears at the end.
Curaçao deserves all of the flowers today. Did CONCACAF proud.

Curaçao I really have to apologise I didnt know your game. I thought the vibe is just "we're just happy to be here!" but man you guys have the fight and really didnt give up. That what makes it all the more special.
One crazy stat : Ecuador had more shots on target (15) than Germany (11) against Curaçao. Yet Germany scored 7 goals and Ecuador none...

Everyone complained about the 48 team expanded format and the drop in quality and the fact that nations like Italy and Denmark couldn't make the cut but Curacao and Cabo Verde did. And here we are. We'd never have had these incredible results if Italy and Denmark had been given spots over these little nations. It's definitely not the highest level of football but damn if this isn't what the World Cup is about. These fan and these nations will never forget these results or these performances.

Nor will Ecuador.
Brooooo I’m so upset at this performance Ecuador is cooked there is no way they are scoring on germanys defense as a Ecuadorian myself I’m big sad tonight
so if Curaçao beat Ivory Coast somehow, there’s a chance

People were trashing Ecuador’s finishing, but Curaçaos goalie was just absolute class today. He both was in the right spot at the right time for about half of them and had some incredible saves on a few others.
Eloy Room, take a fucking bow. Giant amongst men.
Ecuador and Turkey on the same plane home
look at what it means to the Curaçao fans 🥹
Kinda shocked by Ecuador so far honestly

if curacao can play like this against Ivory Coast
 There could be a chance of making round of 32
That would be insane.
They have their goal and their point. Time to play all or nothing

If you asked a Curacao fan after the draw - Germany, Ivory Coast & an Ecuador side unbeaten since 2024 - would they be happy with a goal, a point and still be in it with a group game to go, they'd snap your hands off.
We are all a Dick Advocaat today

They have not made it out of the group stage in 20 years. Also, they seem to consistently have that 1 game in the group stage where they lose in heartbreaking fashion.

2002: Lost 2-1 to Mexico after leading 1-0

2006: N/A as they made it to RO16 without issue

2014: Lost 2-1 to Switzerland at the 90 + 3' via a Seferovic goal 

2022: Losing to Senegal when all they needed was a draw

2026: Losing to Cote D'Ivoire at the death.
Pretty sure Ecuador is cooked. They cant score for shit and now are in a must win situation vs Germany 💀

I already said this in the match thread but I think it bears repeating:

TAKE A BOW CURACAO

Germany might just rest everyone, and still they'll beat ecuador. if Ecuador plays like this, they'll lose and not score a goal. whereas if curacao wants to pull off the improbable, they need to defend and score when given the chances

but, it's looking like it's germany and ivory coast that's going to advance

Turkey in 2021, Denmark in 2022 and now Turkey & Ecuador in 2026.

I don't want to see the tag of "Dark Horse" ever again.

Many critics of this format (which I'm critical too) pointed to this group as one where a team could lose 2 games to the "real teams" and still advance in 3rd place just by pouring it on Curacao.

Funny that barring an upset, this going to be one the groups where a 3rd place team doesn't advance
I'm sorry but this was the alleged "future world class team" Ecuador that people were going on about a few years back?
Room almost has 600k followers rn lol
Absolute legend. He was a fortress this game. Countless saves.
The blueface guy having the time of his life
That goalkeeping performance was like Ochoa on steroids , truly inspirational
Congratulations Curacao fans on earning their 1st point
I'm now convinced that goalkeeper is definitely the most important position in football
This tournament is hopefully going to inspire thousands of aspiring goalkeepers from smaller nations.

In the Post Match Thread of Germany v Ivory Coast, I wrote that Curaçao should be a formality for Ivory Coast. But Curaçao's performance makes me rethink the upcoming game. 

Yes Ecuador dominated that game outrageously but Room is by far the MotM. What a game ! Even though some of Ecuador's chances were more towards the GK so it was easier to save some of the shots, still he had some great saves (like the triple one in the 1st half and the corner kick late in the 2nd half).

On the other hand, Enner Valencia's performance was very disappointing. Had he scored in his 1v1 early in the game, that might have been a different story for Ecuador but he didn't. Ecuador keeps being very unlucky with finishing. Against Ivory Coast, they had 2-3 shots which hit the crossbar/post and tonight they had a GK who played out of his mind. 

Curaçao played very well in the few opportunities that he had and could have even snatched a win. What a moment for Curaçao ! Enjoy it !
This game is so peak that I forgot that lady getting headshot by the ball.
I guess Germany locking up the group tonight is a silver lining for Ecuador since they (Germany) will be more concerned with not collecting injuries or yellow cards than collecting points.
World Cup after dark is magic.
Eloy Room putting Miami FC on the map
As someone who only watches soccer every 4 years, for a 0-0 draw this game was actually a banger. So many chances, so many clutch saves by the keepers
How the hell was that a snooze fest? Are you drunk?
big ups to the goalie for mentally coming back from Germany, the mental shift and strength is no joke.

Ecuador biggest strength was their defense in the qualifiers, they were a rock, allowing only 5 goals in the whole thing. 
The thing is they lack attacking power.
This is so fucked up. Catastrophic performance from Ecuador.
I cannot believe Colombus couldnt work out a deal to keep him a few years back. His agents phone better be plugged in. Jesus Christ.

A lot of ppl diminished Germanys result against Curacao, but today they executed their match plan perfectly. Their goalie will be a national hero. Even with the loss Equador still has a chance to qualify on last match day, especially since Germany will be rotating.
Im shocked
Sounds like this was a successful hatewatch for you lmaooo
Enner Valencia doing exactly what we who have watched him haram the ball in Brazil expected…

Well if you are an Ecuador fan, 4 years ago Brazil, France and Portugal all had nothing to play for on the final matchday and lost to Cameroon, Tunisia, and South Korea respectively. So it's not unthinkable they steal one from a German team that might be playing all their backups and treating it as a friendly.

Nothing I've seen so far makes that seem likely though
Have you seen the game and the GK performance? Nothing idiotic about that take.
Kind of insane how everything is looking up for Curacao, is more likely for them to win or draw than it is for Ecuador to get points against current Germany.
Harambes out for Dick
They showed why they qualified in the first place
I don’t think Turkish flies to Quito
Mate Curacao draw against Cote D'Ivoire on the cards.... woof

As long as they dont lose to Curacao they are going through in 2nd.
They are not bad. Struggled in finishing and confidence. They literally had a 2nd goal but the striker decided to have a second touch instead if just shooting the ball
Maybe next game Curacao gets a winning goal!
Le dark horses strike again
The amount of idiots acting like Ecuador was going to absolutely destroy them is hilarious to me.
No wonder Germany feasted
Yeah they look toothless, an amazing result for Curucao though.
Germany might rest players though, they’ve already won the group.

Eloy Room  
I owe you an apology. I wasn't really familiar with your game.
Don't forget Austria 2022
It was great, but it lacked excitement because you know that any Ecuadorian becomes a ghost when he enters the penalty area and sends everything straight into the goalkeeper's hands
More than half of south America qualifies and still Peru couldn't make it...

Admittedly I havent kept up with Ecuador and many other South America teams. But this Ecuador scored 14 goals out of 18 games in their qualifiers (less than a goal per game). Only better than Peru and Chile (tied with Paraguay). How did People think they were a dark horse if they cant score goals?
2nd in qualifiers to this? Ecuador cant score when it matters, almost like us
Who apparently play at Pitbull Stadium. Yes. That Pitbull.
hindsight experts like that guy are the most hilarious to me
Paid $4000 to see a legendary underdog performance and a historic feat by a goalkeeper nobody expected to save a single shot. One for the ages.
That's not the Ecuador flag, American geography knowledge...
They didn’t actually watch it. Just went by the final score.🙄
Curucão sounds like a Brazilian dish.
Well... Ecuador isn't getting any shirts from Curacao after that one...
FRACAZO ECUADOR 😡
Yet it was comfortably in the more entertaining half of matches
Try to be less of an American.

It's madness for me from a Colombian. I did not even watch the game as I assumed Ecuador would have crushed Curacao with ease. When I turned back it was so shocking. If you couldn't even break down Curacao then how would you even do it versus Germany?
They didn't. They needed only a draw against Senegal and botched that, losing 2-1. The last time they got out of the group stage was in 2006.
Honestly it was a frustrating game. Amazing work by the Curacao keeper, but the amount of poor crosses by Ecuador pmo
Elite defending, shit attacking.
Sounds like something on a FM save you’d do for fun lol
Why Ecuadorians were always shooting straight at the goalkeeper? All 15 shots. That's some low quality striking.
Why not both?
Christopher?
But when was the last time they had a team THIS talented (on paper)
Germany won't drop on this one. Also, their bench is nothing to scoff at. There's hope for Ecuador but I wouldn't be very optimistic.
I’d want the away shirt anyway tbh

2 Screens! To be clear though for integrity reasons last matches in a group HAVE to be at the same time. Otherwise the ones who play later get to see the earlier result and know exactly what they need. Which could be a result that works for both teams potentially resulting in collusion, see the [Disgrace of Gijón](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Disgrace_of_Gij%C3%B3n)
Curacao absolutely earned this point ...
Found the American

Lmao.

He mistook the flag in my flair for the Ecuador flag. I'll say it again:

Found the American!

Yeah it's a big ask to win that one, this needed to be not just a win but a good one to try and get through with 3 points. 

But you guys are solid at the back and could maybe nick one.

Near the beginning of the Germany Cote Ivoire match today, one of the commentators said "this has the look of a proper match, not like..." and then he stopped before he said what everyone who heard him meant. That Germany vs Curacao wasn't a real proper football match, just an exhibition/training for Germany. That's what everyone thought of Curacao.
A mí también me da gusto que tampoco puedas comentar para celebrar con tu equipo
!talk ur shit bro 💪!
Yes big upset that a tiny Caribbean island is the reason the 2nd place CONMEBOL qualifiers that beat Argentina is likely going out in groups. Does that even have to be spelled out? Come on.
Wow you beat Paraguay and Australia.
hows ivory coast doing so far? backed up with studying so can't rlly keep up these days, thanks in advance!
Colombus Crew
I guess I just think of them a great in conmebol. I guess they were just beating a bad Colombia/brazil/argentina
We have the worst NT of our history, but even at our peak we didn't sell our NT as a potential semifinalist as Ecuadorians wanted to sell it in recent months
Enter Valencia. That's it I got nothing else

Caicedo literally just stands 15 yards from the opponent's penalty box anytime Ecuador has the ball in the box or around the box. He wins the ball when it comes out, yes. But the dude can score goals slightly further forward.
If the bad luck is consistent, maybe it’s not bad luck
Damn. Week 3 matches are at the same time. 😭 how are we gonna watch 2 matches at the same time?
If watching on Telemundo they said they are doing a split screen for the Week 3 matches, it’s gonna be goooooddd
You have been missing out. He's awesome.
Ecuador basically screwed their talents.
I’m definitely not
Yellow cards reset after the group stage FYI.
Yeah, players would resort to making long ass shots at the goal from every spot.
Am I crazy or that was a pen at the end? Didn’t get a proper look at the replay though. What a game anyway, congrats to Curacao
all rooms are fully booked, please come later
Nahhh what do you mean, they beat Paraguay & Australia obviously they are now the BEST team in the world and everyone else are just shitty teams!!!!!

Close match, high pace, lots of chances, big upset result

The 2nd US match for example had way less action
Ivory coast look like actual semi final contenders, they're very good
It would be giant field basketball.
I think under 100k lol he at 762k now
Probably should fly the coach there though
Germany wete humiliated in the last two World Cups. I don't see them letting this last group match go even if it's a formality.
GOAT performance from Eloy Room

Holy shit, if you think Curacao came here to park the bus you *clearly* haven't watched a minute of their two games so far. God what an ignorant take. They've been attacking every chance they get, and not even through hoofball but with proper high-energy play over the ground.

I get the general sentiment about small-time teams clogging up the roster but this is doing Curacao a great disrespect, they have guts and deserved that point last night. They probably wouldn't have gotten it if Ecuador wasn't so shit at finishing, but these guys played to win. And they could've, because they too missed a few sitters.
Los ecuatorianos hablan mucho, que bueno que van a salir en la fase de grupos
lollll not really helping the ‘American’s are shit at geography’ shtick
Yea glad to see it for curaçao ,crazy gk performance!
I think that's a bit optimistic but they have been playing well.

Good defence but they are lacking up top, there's a lot of hope for this team in Ecuador because of Caicedo, hincapié and Pacho but there's big gaps. 

I feel like the team has been pretty overrated because of their qualifying performance, and I want Ecuador to do well. The good thing is there's a lot of young talent in Ecuador so the future is bright but this team isn't it.
Germany is so deep that their backups are still no picnic but shockingly they actually have 0 yellows so they don't have to sit anyone since cards reset after the group stage.
If there was not a goalkeeper, football would a much different sport and chaos would go down

Un gusto me da que solo puedes comentar en momentos así y no para celebrar con tu equipo. 

Te vuelvo a leer en 4 años.
Must be one of the very few major cities that Turkish doesn’t fly to then haha
I could see Curacao pulling off a shocker, especially if Ivory Coast aren't careful
About to be a lot of confused people trying to get an Inter Miami jersey with his name on it.

Enner Valencia was dreadful, they could have called up some players from the Ecuadorian league that are better. 

The defence is good but Ecuador lacks attacking talent.
4 points is pretty much a guarantee to be through. Imagine qualifying with a fucking 2-7 goal difference...in second place.
Yeah I thought the same thing. Ecuador honestly didn't play terrible but the Curaçao goalkeeper put on a masterclass, the game could have easily been 3-0.

I highly doubt Germany will allow Ecuador to get points off them. It's not in the German nature to half-ass the last match and, I suspect, they'll want to go for the 3-0-0 to make a statement after going out in the groups the last 2 tournaments.
I guess… did they not get out of the group stage then either!?

Yeah, but if they had any yellows, they'd rest them cause you can still get suspended for the second round.

Germany doesn't have any so the point is moot, but, yno.
We probably will be playing a lot of backups, but German fans have also been screaming at Nagelsmann to start half of our backups.
Honestly it was infuriating watching the lack of urgency from Caicedo. He’s the top player and looked like he couldn’t care less.
I’m pretty sure anyone but Valencia would’ve scored at least 1 if they were in his positions.

The good luck for Ivory Coast is that a singular point will see them through as second anyway. Even if Ecuador upsets Germany, they have the h2h in hand. So while I can see Curacao hold them back, I don't foresee them actually getting through their defense.
cabo verde would have qualified with 32 teams
Okay, this is clearly just bait. GG
Yeah, I see you've been keeping up the act quite admirably after my first comment while I was sleeping, but that reply right there was just too much on the nose dude. 😁

They literally shot directly at the GK all night lol. Just a couple shots to his side and they would have lucked into a goal
ahhhh understood, thanks my guy!
They were shooting straight at him. Never had to flinch even.

Not just that, there's an inherent danger in rotating your squad too much. I keep getting reminded of the 2008 euros where, after we dusted you guys and Italy, we rotated against Romania and then looked all out of sorts against Russia in the quarter finals.

you'll be joining them soon

Couldn’t be more of one; I already am a born-and-bred one. I just don’t think the US has a monopoly on what makes sports great.

As you apparently do.

Americans (of which I am one) have a reputation for disdaining any game where someone doesn’t win. You are living up to that reputation. I don’t think you’re a fake American; I think that you’re what people have in mind when they say “the ugly American.”

How about just an American with standards? There’s a reason soccer is the only sport that regularly ends without someone winning. 

“Everyone gets a point even though they didn’t score!” is objectively lame.

Wow you couldn’t score against the shittiest team to ever qualify

Ecuador sería la selección más chica de Sudamérica si no fuera por Venezuela, se alzan en eliminatorias por la altura pero en mundiales y Copas América regresan a la realidad.
No lo olvides ecuatoriano, tienes 0 Copas América y eres inferior a Bolivia. Aunque tengas 5 jugadores que valgan 100 millones no dejaras de ser la más chica de la costa pacífica.

oh and for sure Curacao and Cabo Verde will advance to at least last32, right? or are they here just to park the bus against everyone and scrap 1-2 points in the group stage and not even qualify from 3rd place?  the quality of football these teams bring to the table while not even qualifying for the ro32 is atrocious
How are 2 shitty teams not being able to score any goals entertaining?

It’s a 48 team tournament, there’s a lot of underdogs.

Nobody will remember this game 3 days from now.
